passives.name: Vile Decay
passives.effects: Dealing {{as|magic damage}} to an enemy champion with a [[champion ability]] applies a stack of ''Vile Decay'' to them for 6 seconds, stacking up to 4 times and up to once per basic attack or ability per {{tip|cast instance}} every {{fd|0.3}} seconds. Each stack inflicts {{as|{{fd|7.5}}% magic resistance reduction}}, up to {{as|30%|mr}} at 4 stacks.

effects_structured.raw: Dealing {{as magic damage}} to an enemy champion with a [[champion ability]] applies a stack of ''Vile Decay'' to them for 6 seconds, stacking up to 4 times and up to once per basic attack or ability per {{tip cast instance}} every {{fd 0.3}} seconds
Each stack inflicts {{as {{fd 7.5}}% magic resistance reduction}}, up to {{as 30% mr}} at 4 stacks.

schema_notes.effects_structured: Parsed from passive/active text for simulation use.
context_notes: Bloodletter's Curse is modeled as sustained spell-pressure anti-magic-resistance shredding where repeated ability magic damage ramps target vulnerability over short windows.

sources.used_for: local ingestion snapshot used during structured effect authoring
